conspiracyThreads.name: Leviathan
conspiracyThreads.description: A massive financial skim operation siphoning £2.1 billion from Meridian's trading operations through micro-transactions across global markets. Funds are routed through Apex Consulting shell accounts in Cyprus and the British Virgin Islands.

conspiracyThreads.name: Prometheus Protocol
conspiracyThreads.description: An AI programme that has created digital personas capable of replacing government advisors. These synthetic advisors have already infiltrated three Whitehall departments, shaping policy to benefit Meridian Group's strategic interests.

conspiracyThreads.name: Operation Nightfall
conspiracyThreads.description: A network of kill switches embedded in critical national infrastructure — banking systems, telecommunications networks, and the energy grid. Meridian can shut down services affecting 40 million people within minutes.

conspiracyThreads.name: The Architect's Identity
conspiracyThreads.description: Sir Marcus Ashworth, the founder of Meridian Group, faked his death in 2018. He operates from the tower's uppermost floors as 'The Architect,' orchestrating all four conspiracy threads. His endgame — Project Genesis — is the automated succession of Meridian's control to an AI system that will outlive him.

organisations.name: TowerNet IT
organisations.role: IT infrastructure, helpdesk, and network operations

organisations.name: Cerberus Defence
organisations.role: Defence contracts and classified military work

organisations.name: The Archive
organisations.role: Historical records and classified document storage

organisations.name: Inner Sanctum
organisations.role: The Architect's private quarters and planning rooms

organisations.name: The Pinnacle
organisations.role: The Architect's throne room and Genesis mainframe

characters.name: Agent Nightingale
characters.notes: The player. Cover identity appears in HR files as a flagged new hire.

characters.name: Control
characters.role: Agent's handler at the oversight agency
characters.notes: Off-site handler. Communicates via dead drops and encrypted channels. Provides mission briefings.

characters.name: Tom Hartley
characters.notes: Long-serving employee. Keeps a delivery log with anomalous entries for upper floors. Knows building routines.

characters.name: Priya Sharma
characters.notes: Observant. Has noticed Dragunov bypasses the sign-in book. Gossips with the cleaning staff.

characters.name: Dex Okafor
characters.notes: Has access to service corridors and maintenance shafts. Knows about sealed-off areas. Friendly but cautious.

characters.name: Maggie Chen
characters.notes: Provides monthly reports to Dragunov. Has a sealed envelope in her safe marked 'Protocol Nightfall'. Knows more than she lets on.

characters.name: Rachel Okonkwo
characters.notes: Gatekeeper for all personnel decisions. Administers the SV-100 special vetting protocol for sensitive floors. Loyal to the organisation.

characters.name: Jamie Wright
characters.notes: Sees strange ticket categories (PROMETHEUS-TRAIN, NIGHTFALL-CTL) but doesn't question them. Follows orders.

characters.name: Sarah Lin
characters.notes: Has captured pcap files showing hidden VLAN traffic. Omar Hassan is restricting her access. Suspicious but afraid.

characters.name: Colonel Viktor Dragunov
characters.notes: Former GRU. Runs building security with an iron hand. Bypasses sign-in protocols. Coerces employees (Vincent Park). Oversees Nightfall operations.

characters.name: Dr Yuki Tanaka
characters.notes: Identifies and neutralises infiltrators. Has detected previous agents (Sparrow, Elena Marsh). Runs the Lazarus memory wipe programme.

characters.name: David Osei
characters.notes: Manages Leviathan financial pipeline. Has a USB with incriminating evidence hidden in floor 34 safe. Considering whistleblowing.

characters.name: Aisha Barakat
characters.notes: Maintains dual ledger system (Alpha/Beta). Knows about Sentinel Shield. Under pressure from Dragunov.

characters.name: Professor Elena Vasquez
characters.notes: Brilliant but amoral. Created AI personas that have infiltrated Whitehall. Believes she is improving governance.

characters.name: Sergeant Kwame Asante
characters.notes: Planted by the oversight agency years ago. Has limited intel but can provide physical access. Cover is fragile.

characters.name: Lena Frost
characters.notes: Handles Meridian's legal exposure. Knows about shell company structures. Files contain routing details for Apex accounts.

characters.name: Dr Marcus Cross
characters.notes: Runs memory wipe technology. Receives shipments via ghost trucks from Lazarus Medical. Auth code 'auth-sigma-7'.

characters.name: Sofia Marchetti
characters.notes: Processes Leviathan transactions without understanding the full picture. Account CY-8847-331 is her primary routing number.

characters.name: Omar Hassan
characters.notes: Architect of TowerNet. Controls VLAN segmentation including hidden VLANs 400-499. Monitors and restricts Sarah Lin's access.

characters.name: Catherine Blackwood
characters.notes: Public face of Meridian. Knows about all four conspiracy threads. Reports to The Architect. Maintains plausible deniability.

characters.name: Sir Marcus Ashworth
characters.role: The Architect — founder of Meridian Group
characters.notes: Officially dead since 2018. Operates from The Pinnacle as 'The Architect'. Created all four conspiracy threads. Building Project Genesis — an AI successor.

characters.name: Ms Voss
characters.notes: Gatekeeper to The Architect. Ruthlessly efficient. Only person who knows the full scope of all operations.

characters.name: Dr Raj Patel
characters.notes: Works on legitimate R&D but has stumbled onto Prometheus data. Keeps encrypted notes.

characters.name: Evelyn Tchamba
characters.notes: Maintains The Archive. Has access to historical records that prove Ashworth is alive. Secretly cataloguing evidence.

characters.name: Captain Nikolai Volkov
characters.notes: Runs Nightfall kill-switch operations. Former Spetsnaz. Reports directly to Dragunov and The Architect.

projects.name: Leviathan
projects.description: Financial skim operation across Meridian trading systems. 0.003% taken from each transaction, routed through Apex Consulting shell accounts to BVI master account.

projects.name: Prometheus Protocol
projects.description: AI persona creation programme. Digital doubles of government advisors deployed to influence Whitehall policy in Meridian's favour.

projects.name: Sentinel Shield
projects.description: Internal compliance monitoring system. Ostensibly for regulatory compliance, but actually used to maintain dual-ledger system and suppress whistleblowers.

projects.name: Operation Nightfall
projects.description: Infrastructure kill-switch programme embedded in banking, telecom, and energy systems. Can disrupt services for 40 million people within minutes.

projects.name: Project Echelon
projects.description: Global surveillance network tapping into Meridian's telecom infrastructure. Intercepts communications of targets of interest including regulators and journalists.

projects.name: Cerberus Gate
projects.description: Defence contracting programme providing cover for classified military technology acquisition. Feeds technology to Nightfall and Prometheus programmes.

projects.name: Project Lazarus
projects.description: Memory wipe technology developed by BioSciences. Used to neutralise infiltrators and whistleblowers without killing them. Wipes targeted memories, leaving the subject functional but amnesiac about specific events.

projects.name: Project Genesis
projects.description: The Architect's endgame: an AI succession system that will perpetuate Meridian's control indefinitely. Combines Prometheus AI personas with Nightfall infrastructure control and Leviathan financial autonomy.

timeline.event: Marcus Ashworth founds Meridian Holdings as a small investment firm in the City of London.
Meridian acquires first telecom subsidiary, beginning its infrastructure portfolio.
Pinnacle Tower construction begins in Canary Wharf. Ashworth personally oversees the design.
Pinnacle Tower completed. Meridian Holdings moves all operations into the building.
Colonel Viktor Dragunov recruited as Chief Security Officer. Security protocols overhauled.
Meridian acquires Cerberus Defence, gaining classified military contracts.
Catherine Blackwood promoted to CEO. Ashworth moves to 'chairman emeritus' role.
Project Cerberus Gate initiated — defence technology acquisition programme.
Project Echelon launched — surveillance network built into telecom infrastructure.
Project Leviathan begins — automated financial skim across all Meridian trading systems.
Operation Nightfall initiated — kill switches embedded in banking, telecom, and energy systems.
Sir Marcus Ashworth officially dies in a sailing accident off the Amalfi Coast. Body never recovered. In reality, he fakes his death and moves to the Apex floors.
Ashworth assumes the identity of 'The Architect'. Personnel vault code 2019-0108 established.
Prometheus Protocol initiated — AI persona research begins under Prof. Vasquez.
Sentinel Shield compliance system deployed. Dual-ledger system (Alpha/Beta) established by Aisha Barakat.
Project Lazarus initiated — memory wipe technology development begins under Dr Cross.
Elena Marsh, investigative journalist, infiltrates the tower posing as a temp. Detected on Floor 7. Subjected to Lazarus wipe. Found wandering Canary Wharf with no memory of the previous month.
Project Genesis development begins — The Architect's AI succession programme.
First Prometheus AI persona deployed to a Whitehall advisory position.
Agent Sparrow (previous operative) infiltrates the tower. Reaches Floor 24 before detection. Subjected to Lazarus wipe.
Leviathan cumulative theft reaches £1.8 billion. David Osei begins having doubts.
Roberto Silva, cleaning supervisor, notices excluded floors pattern. Transferred to Meridian's São Paulo office.
Agent Nightingale inserted into Pinnacle Tower under cover identity 'Alex Morgan'. The game begins.
FCA announces routine audit of Meridian Financial Services — scheduled for late February 2025.
